text:
Hellbell (ヘルベル, Heruberu), "The Twin-Tailed Snake" (, Sōbi no Hebi), is a mysterious snake-like being that counts as one of the Five Threats. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 341 It lives in the swamplands situated south of Lake Mobius, in the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

Appearance

Hellbell is a snake-like creature with two tails. Its distinguishing feature is a large, black lump resembling a bell (from which it derives its name). The skin of its neck up to the black lump from which the tails sprout looks twisted in texture. 

History

When the Federation of Ochima did an expedition to the Dark Continent searching for the Nitro Rice, a type of food that increases longevity, the expedition group went through the south of Lake Mobius and ended up into a wild swampland. There, 99% of them fell prey to Hellbell. Only 11 people survived the attack. 

Abilities & Powers

Hellbell is said to infect its prey with homicidal desire. According to the "Dangerous Creatures Evaluation List" Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Extras utilized by the Hunter Association, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 its threat level is A, which is even higher than that of the Chimera Ants at B. Previously, when the Federation of Ochima came into its territory, Hellbell was able to annihilate 99% of their forces, leaving only 11 survivors, a testament to its power. 

Trivia

It is currently unknown if Hellbell is a single creature or a species.
